x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The person or organization requesting a financial product or service.

Comment:
Example:
A customer applying for a €20,000 personal loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A bank employee who assists the customer and manages the origination process.

Comment:
Example:
A relationship manager helping a client apply for a mortgage.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A bank specialist responsible for evaluating the financial risk of the origination request.

Comment:
Example:
Analyzing a borrowers credit score before approving a loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: KYC Officer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A bank officer responsible for regulatory compliance and identity verification.

Comment:
Example:
Verifying a customers passport and address documents.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guarantor
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Guarantor / Co-Applicant: A person who agrees to share responsibility for the financial obligation.

Comment:
Example:
A parent acting as guarantor for a student loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approval Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Approval Authority / Credit Committee: The person or group responsible for approving or rejecting the origination request.

Comment:
Example:
A credit committee approving a corporate loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: System Processing Team
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Operations / System Processing Team: The team responsible for activating and processing the financial product after approval.

Comment:
Activating a loan account and disbursing the funds.
